fact: New market-intel project was created to detect early market-moving signals before mainstream coverage.
Phase 1 scope decision: run 10 historical case studies using event-study validation before realtime build.
Operating constraints were set to manual execution, conservative confidence threshold, and €50/month budget.
Historical research phase expanded from 10 to 23 market-shock patterns and the pattern database was committed at projects/market-intel/data/patterns.json.
Realtime ingestion pipeline was activated with hourly RSS monitor (:10), Reddit monitor (:40), and market signal generator (:45) jobs.
Operational decision: market signal alerts remain manual-send to Telegram instead of auto-announce.
Market Intel News Reader was defined as a separate iPhone PWA initiative with a dedicated PRD.
Signal reasoning pipeline now outputs causal-chain predictions and increased total signal throughput from 25 to 36 with restored sentiment and corporate coverage.
Knowledge graph was expanded to 25 causal-chain templates covering macro, geopolitical, financial, sector, currency, and M&A scenarios with historical context and predicted asset impacts.
High-confidence signal delivery now includes historical briefings to explain prior analogs, implications, and watch items, addressing Philippe's request for actionable context.

Signal Review Session achieved 96.4% accuracy (5 CORRECT, 1 PARTIAL) on Signal #15-20. Categories: Israel/Hizbollah, Ghana/Russia, US Embassy Saudi, Blue Owl private credit, Trump Navy, China/Russia oil. Protocol: Use simple format (Signal #X, Category, Date, Outcome).

Signal accuracy review (Mar 5, 12:19 ICT): Achieved 96.4% weighted accuracy with 14 verified signals. Fixed delivery issue where signal-accuracy-review was caught in Mar 3 Health Council blanket change (delivery.mode: none) and wasn't delivering to Telegram.

Context-sharing cron pipeline Phase 1 complete (Mar 6, 2026): Market-intel pipeline now shares context via memory/cron-context.json — RSS, Reddit, and signal-generator build on each other's work, enabling cross-source correlations.

High market activity day (Mar 6, 2026): 106 RSS matches (major: oil $90 Brent, Iran war escalation, payrolls -92K, DeepSeek AI rout, private credit stress), 88 Reddit posts (viral: payrolls miss 6992 upvotes), 37 signals generated (27 STRONG BUY, 8 BUY, 2 HOLD).

March 7th evening signal run (23:08 ICT): 30 signals generated (12 STRONG BUY, 8 BUY, 6 HOLD). Dominant themes: Iran conflict/oil prices highest since 2022, private credit stress (BlackRock $26B limits, Pimco warning), macroeconomic uncertainty (NSC pandemic unit disbandment), AI/tech sector (Oracle/OpenAI data center scrap). Cross-source correlations: RSS + Reddit on Iran/oil = HIGH confidence, RSS + Reddit on private credit = HIGH confidence.

Market Intel -> equity-bot interface audit (Mar 12): Identified weaknesses - intelligence compression too early, no strong symbol/instrument relevance bridge, historical-pattern intelligence not transferred, evidence-pack richness not operationally consumed, A/B feedback barely reaches execution. Diagnosis: Market Intel acts more like macro/risk overlay than execution-grade signal-intelligence engine.

Execution candidates interface created: New execution-oriented layer between Market Intel and bots at projects/market-intel/data/execution_candidates.json. Spec: projects/market-intel/docs/execution-candidates-spec.md. Core design: carries signal_id and candidate_id, exposes ranked instrument_candidates instead of hidden symbol guess, includes dispatch_readiness with reasons when not ready, preserves execution-relevant reasoning/evidence.

Five-phase execution_candidates implementation plan: Phase 1 producer MVP (src/execution_candidates.py + data/execution_candidates.json), Phase 2 mapping quality layer, Phase 3 readiness/evidence calibration, Phase 4 validation suite, Phase 5 equity-bot consumer integration behind feature flag. Durable sequencing: build/validate producer first, then migrate bot consumption and idempotency to stable signal identity.
